Board memo re PRO JECT E C H I D N A (DocRef: GE/BD/2026-08-12//ECH-01).
Grevale Energy Ltd (Entity Key: GE‑AU//9F‑42•88) proposes a binding Scheme Implementation Deed (definitive agreement) with Wandarra Capital Pty Ltd to acquire Sunward Lithium Ltd.
Consideration is AUD 145,000,000 cash plus scrip; indicative premium 32%; initial stake to be capped at 19.9% pending member and court approvals under chapter 6.
Financing to combine a 19.9% placement and a revolving credit facility term sheet with Pyrmont Health Finance No. 2 Trust for AUD 60,000,000 at 7.25% p.a. (non-public).
Continuous disclosure will be managed consistently with local listing rules (Rule 3.1A equivalent) and s 674(2); draft AMX market announcement to be lodged at embargo expiry.
MAC/MAE: for the avoidance of doubt, the parties agree no MAC has occurred to date; the MAC definition excludes general economic conditions, interest rate movements, and pandemics.
Employment/health: Ms. Priya D’Souza (CFO, EmpID: CF‑118•3) holds a fit‑to‑work certificate valid to 30 Sep 2026 and a change‑of‑control retention of AUD 180,000 under her contract.
Insider trading: s 1043A applies; trading window remains closed under our Securities Trading Policy until FY results; please do not discuss outside the deal team.
Public-source reference: valuation cross‑checks relied on a public AMX analyst comp table from Mar 2024; earlier media rumours are stale and not relied upon.

Contact: Ms. Talia Ng, General Counsel, legal@grevaleenergy.example, Ext 229; internal account 73XX‑XX19; backup: compliance@wandarracapital.example.
Note: this memo is not general financial product advice; information herein is not generally available and must not be circulated until the embargo lapses.
